title: Multiplayer Map Grid v1
description: Tile grid layout for Conker: Live & Uncut multiplayer maps, using a fixed 4x4 world-unit grid.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the grid schema this file targets, e.g. "1.0.0".

content_version.description: Optional semantic version of the map content, independent of the schema version.

map_id.description: Stable identifier for this map, e.g. "01_Multiplayer_Beach_Dead".

map_name.description: Human-readable name for the map, for editor UIs and debug logs.

tileset_id.description: ID of the tileset definition this grid references (used to validate tile_type).

cell_size.description: World-space size of a single grid cell in Unreal/Unity/Godot units. For this project, 4.0 is the standard.

grid.description: Grid dimensions and row-major cell data.

width.description: Number of cells along the X axis.

height.description: Number of cells along the Y axis.

origin.description: Optional world-space origin for cell (0,0). If omitted, tools assume (0,0,0).

rows.description: Row-major cell data; length must equal height. Each row must have exactly width cells.

metadata.description: Non-runtime metadata used by tools and documentation.

author.description: Free-form identifier for the author or tool that last modified this file.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this grid was first created.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last major edit.

notes.description: Free-form notes for designers and AI-Chat context.

Cell.description: A single grid cell at (x, y). Tools infer indices from row/column position; coordinates are not stored per-cell.

tile_type.description: Identifier for the type of tile to place here. Must exist in the referenced tileset.

role_tags.description: Optional tags describing this cell's gameplay role (e.g. "trench", "shc_base", "mg_nest").

height_offset.description: Optional world-space vertical offset in units, relative to the default tile height. Used for stairs, ramps, and multi-level layouts.

rotation_deg.description: Optional yaw rotation in degrees applied to the tile instance (e.g. 0, 90, 180, 270).

variant_id.description: Optional variant ID within the tile_type, used to select alternate meshes or materials.

flags.description: Optional implementation-specific flags for engine emitters (e.g. "no_collision", "nav_blocker").
